zh: 优化登录界面，支持快速填写服务地址，并可一键切换 HTTP / HTTPS 协议；新增自定义工具栏，支持工具排序与隐藏。
重构 AI 总结与 AI 设置，新增 9 个总结模板，支持多 AI 服务商与自定义模型；同时加入场景微引导、桌面快捷键与多媒体浏览翻页增强。
完善 Windows 窗口拉伸、定位、侧边栏与全部标签页体验，修复启动流程、登录探测、随机漫步与离线笔记上传时创建时间被重置等问题。
en: Refined the login screen with quicker server address entry, one-tap HTTP/HTTPS switching, and a customizable toolbar with sorting and hiding.
Reworked AI summaries and AI settings with nine new summary templates, multi-provider support, custom model settings, plus scenario onboarding and stronger desktop/media browsing shortcuts.
Improved window resizing on Windows, location tools, sidebar and tag layouts, and fixed startup flow, login detection, random walk rendering, and offline note upload timestamps.

zh: 登录页支持快速填写地址，并可切换 HTTP / HTTPS 协议
新增自定义工具栏，支持工具排序与隐藏
桌面快捷键与多媒体浏览翻页增强
AI 总结新增 9 个模板，AI 设置支持多服务商与自定义模型
en: Login screen now supports quicker server address entry and HTTP/HTTPS switching.
Added a customizable toolbar with tool sorting and hiding.
Enhanced desktop shortcuts and page turning for media browsing.
Added nine AI summary templates and support for multiple providers with custom model settings.

zh: 重构 AI 总结与 AI 设置模块
优化侧边栏与全部标签页布局
标签补充最近使用时间并支持排序
en: Refactored the AI summary and AI settings modules.
Optimized the sidebar and all-tags layouts.
Added last-used timestamps for tags and enabled sorting.

zh: 修复若干已知问题与稳定性问题
修复启动流程、登录探测与任务列表显示问题
修复随机漫步渲染错误，并优化筛选弹窗
修复离线笔记上传服务器时创建时间被重置的问题
en: Fixed several known issues and stability problems.
Fixed the startup flow, login detection, and task list display.
Fixed random walk rendering issues and improved the filter dialog.
Fixed the issue where uploading offline notes to the server reset created timestamps.
